mapper.select: select * from t_sys_user where user_name=#{username} and deleted = 0 limit 1

SELECT u.user_name,u.nick_name,u.created_date,u.id FROM t_sys_user u LEFT JOIN t_sys_user_role ur ON u.id = ur.user_id LEFT JOIN t_sys_role r ON ur.role_id = r.id LEFT JOIN t_sys_role_menu rm ON rm.role_id = r.id LEFT JOIN t_sys_menu m ON rm.menu_id = m.id WHERE m.id = 52
and u.user_name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{map.userName},'%')
and u.nick_name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{map.nickName},'%')
